overview: Prydo is a vibrant, dark-themed Web3 identity platform for the LGBTQ+ community. It features pride-themed colors, NFT-based identity (Prydo IDs) with ICRC-7 standard, AI identity verification, wallet connection, and now includes an AI chatbot support assistant and referral fraud detection system.
features: AI chatbot support widget (bilingual Hindi/English) with LGBTQ resources and platform guide
Referral system with unique referral codes per wallet
Automated referral fraud detection flagging suspicious patterns
Admin dashboard with fraud flag review and approve/reject controls
NFT-based Prydo IDs with ICRC-7 standard (Genesis/Standard/Basic tiers)
AI identity verification (document + selfie + liveness challenges)
